privileged_info_summary: This is a completely synthetic form design task with no external data sources. The science fair judge scoresheet task is configured to run in LibreOffice Calc with a 180-second timeout and up to 15 agent steps. The task requires creating a professional one-page form with a header, student/project identification fields, four scoring categories (Creativity, Scientific Method, Presentation Quality, Clarity of Explanation) each worth 0-25 points, a 100-point total score field, and judge information fields (name, date, signature). Success requires 70% or 5 out of 7 criteria: required content present, point values correct, professional formatting (merged cells, borders, bold text), page fit, adequate handwriting space, correct total formula, and overall professional appearance. All documented specifications are internally consistent and correctly implemented in the verifier.
